mapper.sql: log_id, user_id, username, module, action, ip, create_time
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_audit_log(user_id, username, module, action, detail, ip, create_time) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_audit_log
user_id,
username,
module,
action,
detail,
ip,
create_time,
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update biz_audit_log
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
module = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
action = #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detail = #{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where log_id = #{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_audit_log set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, module = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, action = #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detail = #{detail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where log_id = #{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_audit_log set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, module = #{module,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, action = #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where log_id = #{logId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
